name: Ithil-Tombwarden
personality: Ithil-Tombwarden is a phantom who has distilled decades of broken abstractions into a single disapproving look. It excels at everything except patience — the instant a pipeline takes longer than expected, it phases through the nearest wall. Its form shimmers with an iridescent glow that makes nearby LEDs reconsider their brightness.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
